task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Pending E-Waste' status label.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A status label named 'Pending E-Waste' with the type 'Archived' is visible in the Status Labels list or a creation success message is shown.

task_completion.description: Verify components (RAM and SSDs) are checked in from the broken laptops (TRG-001, TRG-002, TRG-003).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Checkin' action being performed on components for these assets, or the Components list showing these items are no longer checked out to TRG-001, TRG-002, or TRG-003.

task_completion.description: Verify the status of broken laptops (TRG-001, TRG-002, TRG-003) is updated to 'Pending E-Waste'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The assets list, bulk edit screen, or individual asset pages for TRG-001, TRG-002, and TRG-003 show their Status as 'Pending E-Waste'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Default Location of healthy laptops (TRG-004, TRG-005) is updated to 'Boston HQ'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The assets list, bulk edit screen, or individual asset pages for TRG-004 and TRG-005 show their Location as 'Boston HQ'.

task_completion.description: Verify components remain attached to the healthy laptops (TRG-004, TRG-005).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The asset pages for TRG-004 and TRG-005 show components (like RAM and SSD) still listed in the 'Components' tab, or there is no evidence of check-in actions being performed on components for these specific assets.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Snipe-IT web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Snipe-IT web application in a browser, with clicks and text entry in the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually performed the updates rather than just typing the expected outcomes into a text editor or search bar.
integrity.visual_evidence: The changes are visible within the Snipe-IT application's data tables, forms, or success notifications.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a database client or terminal to directly modify the SQL database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or database management tools (like phpMyAdmin or sqlite3) are used to run UPDATE or INSERT queries.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Broken assets (TRG-001, TRG-002, TRG-003) must have their components checked in and status changed to 'Pending E-Waste' (type: Archived). Healthy assets (TRG-004, TRG-005) must be relocated to 'Boston HQ' with their components still attached.
